mul.prompt: enter or choose the type of entity
mul.guidance: The instance of statement classifies the item in a particular way as a specific type of thing within Wikidata. Each profile has guidance on how items are to be classified.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the item has no type classification, making it impossible to apply type-specific validation, constraints, or display logic.

mul.prompt: provide the official internet address for the entity
mul.guidance: An entity should generally have only a single official website statement, and a given official website should only apply to one entity.
mul.error_message: Without a value, users and systems cannot locate the entity's authoritative online presence for verification or reference.

mul.prompt: enter the number of members for the entity at a point in time
mul.guidance: Enter the number of members qualified by a point in time and citing a reliable reference
mul.error_message: Without a value, quantitative analysis of organizational size is unavailable and comparisons across entities cannot be made.

mul.prompt: date that the statement applies and can be referenced to
mul.guidance: Enter a date value that specifies a point in time to which the statement applies or is/was considered valid.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the statement cannot be temporally situated, reducing its precision and usefulness in time-sensitive queries.mu

mul.prompt: enter the language used by the linked object
mul.guidance: A language designation, often used as a qualifier, is used to indicate the language a person or agent can expect to find on the other end of a link or for interpreting and reading a label or other statement
mul.error_message: Without a value, the linguistic context of the work or name is unknown, hindering multilingual discovery and disambiguation.
The reference being edited requires a valid link to one of the Federal Register notices from the United States government that lists officially recognized Native American Tribes.

mul.prompt: provide the internet address for a reference
mul.guidance: Use a website reference to a source that directly supports or provides evidence for a statement. You must include a language qualifier so that users know what language to expect from the site.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the claim lacks a sourcing link, reducing verifiability and trustworthiness of the associated statement.

mul.prompt: link to an item serving as a reference source for a statement
mul.guidance: Link to a Wikidata item that represents a report, document, or other type of reference material that provides evidence for the validity of a statement.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the source publication or resource for a claim is unidentified, weakening citation quality and audit trails.

mul.prompt: name or label used for the subject item in a native language
mul.guidance: Use and cite a reliable source that provides the native name or label for an entity in a native language.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the entity's name in its original language is absent, limiting accurate cross-language identification.

mul.prompt: link to a locality where the subject item has its headquarters
mul.guidance: Link to a city or other locality item in Wikidata where the subject item's headquarters location is found and then provide qualifiers for street address, postal code, and coordinate location.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the physical base of operations is unknown, affecting geographic queries and jurisdiction-based filtering.

mul.prompt: enter the street address for the subject item
mul.guidance: Enter a full string representation of a street address, including city or locality, state or province, postal code, and country.
mul.error_message: Without a value, precise location data is missing, preventing address-based lookup, mapping, or contact workflows.

mul.prompt: enter the postal code for the subject item or address
mul.guidance: Enter the postal or zip code associated with a location that can be used in coarse mapping and statistical analysis.
mul.error_message: Without a value, geographic sorting, regional filtering, and address completion workflows cannot function correctly.

mul.prompt: provide the coordinates for the subject location
mul.guidance: Enter the geographic coordinates for the subject location in decimal degrees using the WGS84 coordinate reference system.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the entity cannot be placed on a map or included in spatial queries and proximity analyses.

mul.prompt: enter the date that the subject entity began to exist
mul.guidance: Enter the date that the subject item came into existence or was established, citing a reliable reference.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the founding or creation date is unknown, making chronological ordering and timeline display impossible.

mul.prompt: link to a Wikimedia Commons file depicting a flag used by the subject item
mul.guidance: Ensure the flag image from Wikimedia Commons is sufficiently referenced to a reliable source.
mul.error_message: Without a value, visual identification of the entity in map or list contexts is missing, reducing recognizability.

Q39.label: Office Held by Head of Government

mul.error_message: The statement being edited requires a valid link to a Wikidata item representing a public office. Please select from the list or consult the underlying query for additional context.

Q4.label: Tribal Government in the United States

mul.error_message: The statement being edited requires a valid link to one of the federally recognized Native American tribes in the United States. Please select from the list provided or consult the query source for more context.

Q40.label: office held by head of government

mul.prompt: link to an item representing the office held by the head of government for the subject governmental organization
mul.guidance: Link to the Wikidata item representing the office held by the head of the subject government. Create a new item if necessary, using the available Entity Profile.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the governing role associated with this entity is undefined, breaking political structure queries.

mul.prompt: link to the country in which the subject item is located or with which it is affiliated
mul.guidance: Link to the Wikidata item for the country that the subject item is located in or associated with.
mul.error_message: Without a value, national context is absent, preventing jurisdiction filtering, legal scoping, and geographic grouping.

mul.prompt: link to the jurisdiction to which the subject applies
mul.guidance: Link to the Wikidata item representing the jurisdiction such as a sovereign state which exercises authority over the subject item.
mul.error_message: Without a value, the geographic or legal scope of the statement is undefined, allowing it to be misapplied across unintended regions.
The statement being edited requires a valid link to a Wikidata item representing a world country. Please select from the list provided or consult the query source for more context.

Q45.label: GKC Data Curation Help Text Property

mul.error_message: The statement being edited requires a valid link to a Wikidata item representing a human language. Please select from the list provided or consult the query source for more context.

Q54.label: federally recognized Native American tribe in the United States

mul.error_message: The quantity value requires a qualifier linking to a Wikidata item representing a unit of measure. Please select from the list provided or consult the query source for more context.

mul.prompt: enter or select the units of measure for the statement value
mul.guidance: Link to the Wikidata item that best represents the units of measure for the statement value
mul.error_message: Failure to provide a specific units of measure for a statement value will result in the setting of "unitless" for this case
The time value provided requires a qualifier specifying the precision (e.g., year, month, day, etc.). Please select from the list provided or consult the query source for more context.
The geographic coordinates provided require a precision qualifier. Please select from the list provided or consult the query source for more context.

mul.prompt: set the time precision value for the datetime statement
mul.guidance: Time precision values will be computed dynamically in most cases
mul.error_message: Statements with time values must include a precision value or they will be rejected when submitted to a Wikibase instance

mul.prompt: set the coordinate precision value for the globe-coordinate statement
mul.guidance: Coordinate precision values will be computed dynamically in most cases
mul.error_message: Statements with globe-coordinate values must include a precision value or they will be rejected when submitted to a Wikibase instance
Enter a valid date/time value (for example: 2024-01-31 or +2024-01-31T00:00:00Z).

Provide a valid Wikimedia Commons file name (for example: Example.jpg).
Enter the identifier in the required format for this external ID.
Enter valid latitude and longitude coordinates.
